title: Client
description: A client device connected to the network.

name.description: Hostname or display name of the client.

ip_address.description: IP address assigned to the client.

network.description: SSID or network name the client is connected to.

band.description: Radio band of the wireless connection.

channel.description: Channel number of the wireless connection.

associated_device.description: Serial number of the device the client is connected to.

group_name.description: Group name of the associated device.

site.description: Site name of the associated device.
